message:
fix: use Polars DataFrame API for fair benchmark comparison

- LanceQL/DuckDB: CLI with SQL (native interface)
- Polars: Python with DataFrame API (native interface)
- Remove polars-cli dependency (use polars Python library)
- All have similar subprocess spawn overhead (~30ms)

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
           brew install duckdb
-          pip install polars numpy polars-cli
+          pip install polars numpy
 
       - name: Build Metal shaders
         run: zig build metal-shaders
@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@ jobs:
           curl -LO https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb/releases/download/v1.1.3/duckdb_cli-linux-amd64.zip
           unzip duckdb_cli-linux-amd64.zip
           sudo mv duckdb /usr/local/bin/
-          pip install polars numpy polars-cli
+          pip install polars numpy
 
       - name: Build library
         run: zig build lib
